2604.19652.title: Environmental Sound Deepfake Detection Using Deep-Learning Framework
2604.19652.paper_summary: In this paper, we propose a deep-learning framework for environmental sound deepfake detection (ESDD) -- the task of identifying whether the sound scene and sound event in an input audio recording is fake or not. To this end, we conducted extensive experiments to explore how individual spectrograms, a wide range of network architectures and pre-trained models, ensemble of spectrograms or network architectures affect the ESDD task performance. The experimental results on the benchmark datasets of EnvSDD and ESDD-Challenge-TestSet indicate that detecting deepfake audio of sound scene and detecting deepfake audio of sound event should be considered as individual tasks. We also indicate that the approach of finetuning a pre-trained model is more effective compared with training a model from scratch for the ESDD task. Eventually, our best model, which was finetuned from the pre-trained WavLM model with the proposed three-stage training strategy, achieve the Accuracy of 0.98, F1 Score of 0.95, AuC of 0.99 on EnvSDD Test subset and the Accuracy of 0.88, F1 Score of 0.77, and AuC of 0.92 on ESDD-Challenge-TestSet dataset.
2604.19652.paper_summary_zh: 在本文中，我們提出了一個用於環境聲音深偽檢測（ESDD）的深度學習框架——識別輸入音頻錄音中的聲音場景和聲音事件是否為偽造的任務。為此，我們進行了廣泛的實驗，以探索個別聲譜圖、各種網絡架構和預訓練模型、聲譜圖或網絡架構的集成如何影響ESDD任務的性能。對EnvSDD和ESDD-Challenge-TestSet基準數據集的實驗結果表明，檢測聲音場景的深偽音頻和檢測聲音事件的深偽音頻應視為獨立任務。我們還指出，相較於從頭開始訓練模型，微調預訓練模型的方法對於ESDD任務更為有效。最終，我們的最佳模型是從預訓練的WavLM模型微調而來，並採用了提出的三階段訓練策略，在EnvSDD測試子集上達到0.98的準確率、0.95的F1分數和0.99的AuC，在ESDD-Challenge-TestSet數據集上達到0.88的準確率、0.77的F1分數和0.92的AuC。
2604.19652.author: Lam Pham et.al.
2604.19652.authors: Lam Pham, Khoi Vu, Dat Tran, Phat Lam, Vu Nguyen, David Fischinger, Alexander Schindler, Martin Boyer, Son Le
